---
title: "Day 3 Mucking around"
date: 2021-08-17
categories: ["club: cumbria","expedition","muck","sea"]
image: https://placehold.co/600x400/EEE/31343C
---

- Distance: 7.4 km
- [Strava](https://www.strava.com/activities/5808920797)

Rescue practice

![](https://placehold.co/600x400/EEE/31343C)
